name: ClicktraIndia
description:
Why should entertainment be the same for everyone across all age-groups? Why can’t entertainment be a mix of unique experience, a fun activity, an exciting game which can be enjoyed by family or friends? We thought about questions like these and came up with the perfect answer.

The answer is Clicktra, India’s first-of-its-kind entertainment centre. Located in Indore across 18,000 square feet, it offers a big bunch of entertainment options, all under one roof. 

There are twelve sets, each with a unique experience. 

Selfie Themes | VR Zones | Silent Disco | Remote Control Car Racing | Interactive Projection Zone | Party Halls | Karaoke Booth | Laser Wars | Mini Golf | 360º Turntable | American Diner

Clicktra changes the entire dynamics of the entertainment scene in Indore. One can enter a whole new world of thrilling options and choose the one that they want to experience. Every set is thoughtfully created so that the visitors have a wonderful time, full of memories.

name: 22G GAMING
description:
Welcome to 22G GAMING — Jahaan Virtual Reality aur Sports ka perfect combination milta hai!

Main hoon Rahul (22G), aur yahan aapko milega pure sports ka VR version — jaise:

🏏 IB Cricket — Feel like a real cricketer!
🏓 VR Table Tennis — Reaction time aur skill ka asli test!
⛳ VR Golf — Real-world swings, real virtual challenges!
⚽ Aur naye-naye trending VR sports games — jisme milti hai asli game wali feeling, ghar baithe-baithe!

Mera aim simple hai — "Virtual Sports ko Real Banake Dikhana!"
Har gameplay aapko lagega jaise aap khud stadium me ya ground me khade ho, aur game ka thrill feel kar rahe ho.

Agar aap bhi ho ek sports lover, VR lover ya dono, to Subscribe kar lo aur join ho jao hamare community ke saath — jahan sirf entertainment nahi, asli sports wali feeling milti hai.

name: PCMIX
description:
We decode the engineering mysteries inside your PC.

If you are tired of surface-level tech reviews and want to understand how your hardware actually works, you are in the right place. This channel explores the hidden science behind Processors, Graphics Cards, and Gaming Tech, explained simply in Hindi and dubbed English.

From debunking marketing myths like the "Nanometer Lie" to deep-diving into Silicon Lottery, Chip Binning, and Tech History, we turn complex engineering into engaging stories. No fluff, just pure tech reality.

We cover:
• Deep Dives into Intel, AMD & NVIDIA Architectures
• PC Building Science & Myths
• The Engineering behind Keyboards, Mice & Monitors
• The History of Computing.

Subscribe to become a smarter PC user. Let's build something awesome.

name: Gaming It Hub
description:
Hey there, welcome to Gaming IT Hub Nehruplace Delhi! 🚀 Here, we make PC building easy, affordable, and super fun—perfect for gamers and tech lovers across India! Whether you're planning your first gaming setup or upgrading your PC with the latest hardware, this is the place for you.
On this channel, you'll find:
1. Step-by-step PC building tutorials for every budget
2.Unboxings and reviews of the latest computer parts
3.Pro tips to boost your gaming performance and FPS
4.Comparison guides to help you pick the right parts for your needs
With 7+ years of experience in gaming PCs and hardware, our goal is to simplify everything so you can build a high-performance PC without the stress. We upload weekly videos with tips, tricks, and updates on the latest gaming tech.
If you’re excited about gaming, tech, and DIY PC building, subscribe to join the community! Don’t forget to share your questions and setups in the comments 🎮💻
